summary:
The auditory pathway progresses from the cochlear nucleus to the inferior colliculus, then to the medial geniculate body, ending at the auditory cortex. Among the provided structures, the correct peripherally-to-centrally ordered sequence is cochlear nucleus → inferior colliculus → medial geniculate body → auditory cortex. 

(Note: The term 'auditory coex' was identified as a typographical error for 'auditory cortex'.)

The summary above contains more than two sentences. Please provide strictly TWO SENTENCES maximum.
